title: cephalophilon humile
intro: Cephalophilon humile is a type of plant that belongs to the family of flowering plants, specifically a species of flowering plant in the genus Cephalophilon. Cephalophilon humile is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cephalophilon humile include its ability to reduce fever, relieve cough, and soothe respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Cephalophilon humile can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
